svg.title: AutoClean-Pro system architecture showing CORS middleware, FastAPI routing, environment and agent layers
svg.desc: Flowchart showing a request from an external agent passing through CORS middleware, FastAPI router, environment layer with tool registry and Bayesian weighting, then returning a response

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the inference agent doing?')
sendPrompt('What does CORS middleware do in AutoClean-Pro?')
sendPrompt('What routes does the FastAPI server expose?')
sendPrompt('How does the Bayesian weighting work?')
sendPrompt('What tools are in the ToolRegistry?')
sendPrompt('How does the deterministic grader score results?')
sendPrompt('What fields does the Observation contain?')

g.text: agent reads scores → picks next action
